title: TriggerEnvelope
description: Typed container for external trigger data submitted to openclaw enqueue. Inspired by Dify TriggerData/ScheduleTriggerData/WebhookTriggerData pattern. Stored as trigger.json alongside job.json in the run directory.

triggered_by.description: Agent, user, or service identity that submitted this trigger.

idempotency_key.description: Deduplication key. A re-submit with the same key for the same project/task should be a no-op (enforcement is a future concern; schema-only in this slice).

reason_code.description: Machine-readable reason for the trigger, e.g. 'schedule_missed', 'webhook_push', 'manual_retry'.

payload.description: Trigger-type-specific payload. Must match the subtype for the declared trigger_type.

cron_expression.description: The cron expression that fired this trigger, e.g. '*/15 * * * *'.

scheduled_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this run was scheduled to start.

source.description: External service that sent the webhook, e.g. 'github', 'linear', 'custom'.

event_name.description: Event name from the webhook, e.g. 'push', 'issue.created'.

headers.description: Relevant HTTP headers from the webhook request.

body.description: Parsed webhook body (top-level keys only; nested values are opaque).
